# MAXA UI

> React component library with Tailwind v4 and Radix UI primitives

Status: Under development

## Packages
- @maxa/ui: React components
- @maxa/tokens: CSS variables (theme.css)
- @maxa/icons: SVG icon components
- @maxa/hooks: Reusable React hooks
- @maxa/cli: CLI tool
- @maxa/mcp: MCP server for AI tool integration

## Current DS Snapshot
- MAXA is design-system-first.
- External 89-profile design-system research corpus: `.knowledge/Design System Research Corpus.md`
- Current Badge/Tag plan: `.knowledge/Badge and Tag Component Plan.md`
- Figma source of truth: `packages/tokens/figma/`
- Figma collections:
  - `Primitives`
  - `Color modes`
  - `Spacing`
  - `Radius`
  - `Typography`
  - `Containers`
  - `Breakpoints`
- `Primitives` contains `Colors/...` and `Spacing/...`
- Typography currently uses:
  - `Font family/body = Montserrat`
  - `Font family/mono = Bebas Neue`
- Typography roles:
  - `heading-2xl`, `heading-xl`, `heading-lg`, `heading-md`, `heading-sm`, `heading-xs`
  - `text-lg`, `text-md`, `text-sm`
  - `caption-sm`, `caption-xs`
- Regenerate Figma import bundle from repo root with:
  - `pnpm figma:bundle`

## Docs
- https://ui.maxa.com/docs
- https://ui.maxa.com/AGENT.md
